title: stelis ringens
intro: Stelis ringens, also known as the orchid tree or bird's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis ringens include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
